figures.caption: Fig. 1: Uncontrolled (u = 0) trajectory of the Lorenz system (26), tracing the chaotic attractor about the two unstable equilibria ±x⋆ (green) and the origin (black).
Fig. 2: Multi-step open-loop prediction error of the reduced GeKo model for the Lorenz system.
Fig. 3: Closed-loop state trajectories under GeKo-MPC from the 10 initial conditions and the target x⋆ (dashed black lines).
Fig. 4: Phase-space view of the 10 closed-loop trajectories.
Fig. 5: MPC control inputs for the 10 closed-loop runs.
